dict.source: With this on, you can preview your Obsidian appearance by simply putting the cursor outside of the settings window.
dict.target: 开启此功能后，只需将光标移出设置窗口即可预览您的 Obsidian 外观。

dict.source: Colors in window. If you add another theme before this, it will be used in "inherit", or just the usual Obsidian colors.
dict.target: 窗口中的颜色。如果您在此之前添加了另一个主题，它将用于“继承”，或者仅使用常规的 Obsidian 颜色。

dict.source: Disable bevels, resulting in a more minimalist appearance.
dict.target: 禁用斜面效果，从而获得更简约的外观。
启用 XP 风格图标

dict.source: Enable colorful XP-style icons to replace flat SVG icons. This is only done where the icons are supported. (Not supported with dtm08)
dict.target: 启用多彩的 XP 风格图标以替换扁平 SVG 图标。此操作仅在支持图标的区域进行。（dtm08 不支持）
启用类似 Blender 2.7 的下拉菜单。

dict.source: Enable Windows 7 Title Bar and Frame.
dict.target: 启用 Windows 7 标题栏和边框。
颜色强度乘数（仅强调色）

dict.source: Determine Micro Mike Palette color brightness.
dict.target: 确定 Micro Mike 调色板的颜色亮度。
斜面颜色强度乘数（仅强调色）

dict.source: Determine Micro Mike Palette color brightness for bevel.
dict.target: 确定 Micro Mike 调色板用于斜面的颜色亮度。
链接亮度强度乘数（仅强调色）

dict.source: Determine Micro Mike Palette additive brightness for link.
dict.target: 确定 Micro Mike 调色板用于链接的附加亮度。
在编辑器模式下启用渐变

dict.source: Shared UI Components (Scrollbar, Drag bars, Resize bars, Ribbon...)
dict.target: 共享 UI 组件（滚动条、拖动条、调整大小条、功能区...）

dict.source: The size of the resize bars for each of the sidebars.
dict.target: 每个侧边栏的调整大小条尺寸。

dict.source: The width of the scrollbar on the side.
The width of the space occupied by the ribbon.
dict.target: 功能区所占空间的宽度。

dict.source: The height of the ribbon buttons.
Micro Mike uses a hack to make sidebars disappear immediately upon pressing the button. This disables that.
dict.target: Micro Mike 使用一种技巧使侧边栏在按下按钮后立即消失。此选项禁用该功能。
扩展右侧边栏最小宽度

dict.source: With the right sidebar button now on the task bar, Micro Mike makes the right sidebar longer to compensate - if you want.
dict.target: 由于右侧边栏按钮现在位于任务栏上，Micro Mike 会相应地加长右侧边栏——如果您愿意的话。
编辑器仪表板按钮宽度 %

dict.source: Size of text window in text editor.
dict.target: 文本编辑器中文本窗口的大小。

dict.source: Undo modified left-aligned readable line length to normal standard.
dict.target: 将修改过的左对齐可读行长度恢复为正常标准。

dict.source: Disable Properties Display in Preview / Live Preview (Still avail. in Source Mode)
dict.target: 在预览/实时预览中禁用属性显示（源码模式下仍可用）

dict.source: By default, Micro Mike modifies the Backlinks plugin's optional footer display to display at the top a simple set of links leading to your current document.
dict.target: 默认情况下，Micro Mike 会修改反向链接插件的可选页脚显示，使其在顶部显示一组指向当前文档的简单链接。

dict.source: This switch disables the line-height focused modifications to the editor.
dict.target: 此开关禁用针对编辑器的行高相关修改。
禁用简易编辑器代码块

dict.source: This switch disables the modified, line-height aligned codeblocks.
dict.target: 此开关禁用修改过的、与行高对齐的代码块。

dict.source: This switch disables the modified, line-height aligned callout.
dict.target: 此开关禁用修改过的、与行高对齐的标注。

dict.source: Re-Enable Dynamic Unloading in Text Preview
dict.target: 在文本预览中重新启用动态卸载

dict.source: The width of the stacked tabs.
Did you know you can close tabs by middle clicking on them?
dict.target: 您知道可以通过中键点击来关闭标签页吗？

dict.source: If there is space and the title is long enough, the text will now overflow onto more lines.
dict.target: 如果空间足够且标题足够长，文本现在将溢出到更多行。
编辑器（非堆叠）标签页高度
编辑器堆叠标签页高度

dict.source: This creates a space at the left corner where the window can be dragged.
dict.target: 在左侧角落创建一个空间，用于拖动窗口。

dict.source: This creates a space at the right corner in editor tabs where the window can be dragged.
dict.target: 在编辑器标签页的右侧角落创建一个空间，用于拖动窗口。

dict.source: Disable Left Sidebar Button Corner Alignment
dict.target: 禁用左侧边栏按钮角落对齐

dict.source: This allows you to disable the left corner positioning of the left sidebar button.
dict.target: 允许您禁用左侧边栏按钮的左侧角落定位。
右侧边栏按钮对齐方式

dict.source:
This determines the alignment of the sidebar button.
 **titlebarAlign**: Acts as a fourth button on the titlebar.
 **outsideSidebar**: Creates a button on the outside of the sidebar to the right - this is the default behavior.
 **insideSidebar**: Creates a button inside the sidebar to the left.
dict.target:
确定侧边栏按钮的对齐方式。
 **titlebarAlign**: 作为标题栏上的第四个按钮。
 **outsideSidebar**: 在侧边栏外部右侧创建一个按钮 - 这是默认行为。
 **insideSidebar**: 在侧边栏内部左侧创建一个按钮。

dict.source: Space is made for the titlebar buttons. If the drag space height is high enough, then it doesn't overlap even without this.
dict.target: 为标题栏按钮预留了空间。如果拖动空间高度足够高，即使没有此选项也不会重叠。

dict.source: Tree Elements (File browser, outline, tag, search, backlinks...)
dict.target: 树状元素（文件浏览器、大纲、标签、搜索、反向链接...）

dict.source: The size of each level's separation. This affects the size of the collapse buttons. (Hierarchical Display - Editor, Outline, Tag View, Outgoing/Backlinks)
dict.target: 每个层级的分隔大小。这会影响折叠按钮的大小。（层级显示 - 编辑器、大纲、标签视图、传出/反向链接）

dict.source: The height of each section. This affects the size of the collapse buttons. (Hierarchical Display - Editor, Outline, Tag View, Outgoing/Backlinks)
dict.target: 每个部分的高度。这会影响折叠按钮的大小。（层级显示 - 编辑器、大纲、标签视图、传出/反向链接）

dict.source: The size of the fonts. Please adjust "Hierarchical Display Height" above to actually make the sections larger. This affects the size of the collapse buttons. (Hierarchical Display - Editor, Outline, Tag View, Outgoing/Backlinks)
dict.target: 字体大小。请调整上方的“层级显示高度”以实际增大各部分尺寸。此设置影响折叠按钮的大小。（层级显示 - 编辑器、大纲、标签视图、出链/入链）

dict.source: Enables word wrap in the file browser, ensuring full titles will be displayed.
dict.target: 在文件浏览器中启用自动换行，确保完整标题得以显示。
文件浏览器文件夹加粗

dict.source: Layered Background in File Browser Folders
dict.target: 文件浏览器文件夹分层背景

dict.source: Enable layered background in file browser. This helps perceive depth.
dict.target: 在文件浏览器中启用分层背景。这有助于感知深度。
重新启用侧边栏动态卸载

dict.source: Pick the compass direction that the generic (file seeking, etc...) prompt is aligned to.
dict.target: 选择通用提示（如文件查找等）对齐的罗盘方向。

dict.source: In percentage, choose the height of the prompt.
dict.target: 以百分比选择提示窗口的高度。

dict.source: In percentage, choose the width of the prompt.
dict.target: 以百分比选择提示窗口的宽度。

dict.source: Choose an X offset for the prompt. If uncarefully applied, will cause it to move offscreen.
dict.target: 为提示窗口选择 X 偏移量。若设置不当，可能导致其移出屏幕。

dict.source: Choose a Y offset for the prompt. If uncarefully applied, will cause it to move offscreen.
dict.target: 为提示窗口选择 Y 偏移量。若设置不当，可能导致其移出屏幕。

dict.source: The prompt window is not allowed to become any smaller than this size. The max size is defined by the above setting.
dict.target: 提示窗口不允许小于此尺寸。最大尺寸由上方设置定义。
禁用备用设置对齐方式

dict.source: The experimental new alignment for visual ergonomics can be disabled here.
dict.target: 可在此处禁用为视觉人体工学设计的实验性新对齐方式。

dict.source: Increase size of settings buttons for convenience.
dict.target: 为方便操作，增大设置按钮的尺寸。

dict.source: If the alternate settings alignement is enabled, this determines the amount of space it is given.
dict.target: 若启用了备用设置对齐方式，此设置决定其占用的空间大小。

dict.source: Pick the compass direction that the generic (file seeking, etc...) settings is aligned to.
dict.target: 选择通用设置（如文件查找等）对齐的罗盘方向。

dict.source: In percentage, choose the height of the settings.
dict.target: 以百分比选择设置窗口的高度。

dict.source: In percentage, choose the width of the settings.
dict.target: 以百分比选择设置窗口的宽度。

dict.source: Choose an X offset for the settings. If uncarefully applied, will cause it to move offscreen.
dict.target: 为设置窗口选择 X 偏移量。若设置不当，可能导致其移出屏幕。

dict.source: Choose a Y offset for the settings. If uncarefully applied, will cause it to move offscreen.
dict.target: 为设置窗口选择 Y 偏移量。若设置不当，可能导致其移出屏幕。

dict.source: The settings window is not allowed to become any smaller than this size. The max size is defined by the above setting.
dict.target: 设置窗口不允许小于此尺寸。最大尺寸由上方设置定义。

dict.source: When the window is small enough, Micro Mike focuses the window by removing side elements. This disables that.
dict.target: 当窗口足够小时，Micro Mike 会通过移除侧边元素来聚焦窗口。此设置禁用该功能。
